name: xau_bb_rsi_meanrev_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside a 1.75-sigma Bollinger Band with RSI(7) at an extreme, price mean-reverts to the middle band within 30 bars, provided BB width is above its 30th percentile (avoiding dead ranges).

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi7 < 10 AND bb_width_pctile >= 30
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi7 > 90 AND bb_width_pctile >= 30

regime_filter.rationale: Avoid both dead markets and extreme volatility spikes where mean reversion fails.

falsification_criteria: PF < 1.3 or trades < 200 on IS; or BB-width filter removes >80% of signals (evidence filter is miscalibrated).
